- total_budget: Provided as a single figure, but not a detailed breakdown beyond the line items. However, since line items with costs are present and a total is given, this counts as a complete cost breakdown at a basic level. Mark as covered.
Thus, 6 of 7 items are fully specified; transportation lacks sufficient flight details.
